title: Conditional List Feature
description: Places the first suitable feature within a collection based on conditions.

conditional_list_definition.title: Conditional List Definition
conditional_list_definition.description: A single Conditional List Feature Definition.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

conditional_features.description: Array of features with conditions, evaluated in order.

places_feature.description: Reference to the feature to be placed if condition succeeds.

condition.description: Molang expression that must evaluate to true for this feature to be placed.

early_out_scheme.description: Optional. Whether to stop on first successful condition or first successful placement. Default is placement_success.
